title: Triples with Bitwise AND Equal To Zero
hints: Notice that A[i] & A[j] & A[k] == 0 is equivalent to (A[i] & A[j]) & A[k] == 0. This suggests grouping pairs first.
Compute all possible pairwise bitwise ANDs of elements in A. Store their frequencies in a hash map or array.
For each unique pairwise AND value P, count how many elements in A satisfy P & A[k] == 0. Multiply the count of P by this number and sum up.
